subject: [SDC]: Release 1.16.1
commit_message:
[SDC]: Release 1.16.1

- component upgrade and dependency upgrade to resolve vulnerabilities

Issue-ID: SDC-4806
Change-Id: Ie61ceec79149bff6fc62e3d95c87776608ffbb35
Signed-off-by: dhanush.p <dhanush.p@t-systems.com>
